query: My friends all say my idea is great. I want to start building the MVP right away.
expected_behavior: Explicitly rejects 'friends said it's a great idea' as validation
Halts the build recommendation and requires an assumption test first
Provides a concrete next step: 5 Mom Test interviews or a smoke test landing page
States the kill threshold that must be set before data collection begins
Does not generate code, wireframes, or a product spec at this stage
